technical_specs.value: L: Live 230 V - 50 Hz N: Neutral

source_refs.source_quote: Power supply: L: Live 230 V - 50 Hz N: Neutral
The connection to the appliance is a 22 mm copper tail located at the rear of the gas service cock.
The mains supply is 230 V ~ 50 Hz fused at 3 A.
The mains supply is 230 V ~ 50 Hz fused at 3 A.

technical_specs.value: 3 core 0.75 mm 3183Y multi strand flexible type

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler must be connected to the mains fused 3 A 230 V 50 HZ supply & control system using cable of 3 core 0.75 mm 3183Y multi strand flexible type.
The appliance expansion vessel is pre-charged to 1.0 bar.
Therefore, the minimum cold fill pressure is 1.0 bar.
The vessel is suitable for correct operation for system capacities up to 100 litres.
The pressure relief valve is set at 3 bar

technical_specs.parameter: Pressure relief discharge pipe minimum diameter

source_refs.source_quote: The pressure relief discharge pipe should be not less than 15 mm diameter
It has a maximum head of 5 metres.
The boiler has a protection rating of IPX5D

technical_specs.parameter: Condensate drain pipe minimum run slope

source_refs.source_quote: 50 mm per metre of pipe run – 2.5° minimum run.
The condensate outlet will accept 21.5 mm (¾ in) plastic overflow pipe.
The boiler condensate trap incorporates a seal of 75 mm

technical_specs.parameter: Condensate pipe minimum diameter (internal runs > 3m or cold areas)

source_refs.source_quote: Internal runs greater than 3 metres or runs in cold areas should use 32 mm waste pipe.
External runs MUST be a MINIMUM of 32 mm and fully insulated with ma-terial suitable for external use.
Clearance above 178 mm

technical_specs.parameter: Clearance to front of boiler (for servicing)

source_refs.source_quote: 450 (for servicing, 5 in operation)
Side Clearance 2.5 mm
Clearance below 150 mm

fault_codes.description: Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected
manufacturer_steps: Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

source_refs.source_quote: A.00 .34 Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not de-tected OUTDOOR SENSOR NOT DETECTED Connect the outdoor sensor Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

manufacturer_steps: Check the system pressure and restore it
Check the pressure of the expansion vessel

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .06 Low water pressure Check the system pressure and restore it Check the pressure of the expansion vessel Check for any sys-tem/boiler leaks
